message:
Forge is treating this as a [api] based on your prompt. Generating plan...

<think>
The user wants to create 6 files for a small full-stack project.
I need to create:
1. `app.py` (Flask)
2. `index.ts` (TypeScript)
3. `utils.js` (JavaScript)
4. `config.json` (JSON)
5. `styles.css` (CSS)
6. `README.md` (Markdown)

I will use `str_replace_editor` with the `create` command for each file.
I will use `task_tracker` to manage the creation process.
</think>

<task_tracker command="plan" title="Create project files" task_list=[
    {"id": "1", "description": "Create app.py", "status": "pending"},
    {"id": "2", "description": "Create index.ts", "status": "pending"},
    {"id": "3", "description": "Create utils.js", "status": "pending"},
    {"id": "4", "description": "Create config.json", "status": "pending"},
    {"id": "5", "description": "Create styles.css", "status": "pending"},
    {"id": "6", "description": "Create README.md", "status": "pending"}
]>

<thought>
I will now create the files one by one.
</thought>

<task_tracker command="update" task_list=[
    {"id": "1", "description": "Create app.py", "status": "in_progress"},
    {"id": "2", "description": "Create index.ts", "status": "pending"},
    {"id": "3", "description": "Create utils.js", "status": "pending"},
    {"id": "4", "description": "Create config.json", "status": "pending"},
    {"id": "5", "description": "Create styles.css", "status": "pending"},
    {"id": "6", "description": "Create README.md", "status": "pending"}
]>

<tool_call>
{"command": "create", "file_text": "from flask import Flask, jsonify\n\napp = Flask(__name__)\n\n@app.route('/health', methods=['GET'])\ndef health():\n    return jsonify({'status': 'ok'}), 200\n\n@app.route('/')\ndef hello():\n    return 'Hello World!'\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    app.run(debug=True)", "path": "/workspace/app.py"}
</tool_call>

<task_tracker command="update" task_list=[
    {"id": "1", "description": "Create app.py", "status": "completed"},
    {"id": "2", "description": "Create index.ts", "status": "in_progress"},
    {"id": "3", "description": "Create utils.js", "status": "pending"},
    {"id": "4", "description": "Create config.json", "status": "pending"},
    {"id": "5", "description": "Create styles.css", "status": "pending"},
    {"id": "6", "description": "Create README.md", "status": "pending"}
]>

<tool_call>
{"command": "create", "file_text": "export function greet(name: string): string {\n  return `Hello, ${name}!`;\n}\n\nconsole.log(greet('World'));", "path": "/workspace/index.ts"}
</tool_call>

<task_tracker command="update" task_list=[
    {"id": "1", "description": "Create app.py", "status": "completed"},
    {"id": "2", "description": "Create index.ts", "status": "completed"},
    {"id": "3", "description": "Create utils.js", "status": "in_progress"},
    {"id": "4", "description": "Create config.json", "status": "pending"},
    {"id": "5", "description": "Create styles.css", "status": "pending"},
    {"id": "6", "description": "Create README.md", "status": "pending"}
]>

<tool_call>
{"command": "create", "file_text": "function add(a, b) {\n  return a + b;\n}\n\nfunction multiply(a, b) {\n  return a * b;\n}\n\nmodule.exports = { add, multiply };", "path": "/workspace/utils.js"}
</tool_call>

<task_tracker command="update" task_list=[
    {"id": "1", "description": "Create app.py", "status": "completed"},
    {"id": "2", "description": "Create index.ts", "status": "completed"},
    {"id": "3", "description": "Create utils.js", "status": "completed"},
    {"id": "4", "description": "Create config.json", "status": "in_progress"},
    {"id": "5", "description": "Create styles.css", "status": "pending"},

]>

</tool_call>

    {"id": "1", "description": "Create app.py", "status": "completed"},
    {"id": "2", "description": "Create index.ts", "status": "completed"},
    {"id": "3", "description": "Create utils.js", "status": "completed"},
    {"id": "4", "description": "Create config.json", "status": "completed"},
    {"id": "5", "description": "Create styles.css", "status": "in_progress"},
    {"id": "6", "description": "Create README.md", "status": "pending"}
]>

<tool_call>
{"command": "create", "file_text": "body {\n  font-family: sans-serif;\n}\n\n.container {\n  max-width: 800px;\n  margin: 0 auto;\n  padding: 20px;\n}\n\n.button {\n  padding: 10px 20px;\n  background-color: blue;\n  color: white;\n  border: none;\n  border-radius: 5px;\n}", "path": "/workspace/styles.css"}
</tool_call>

    {"id": "1", "description": "Create app.py", "status": "completed"},
    {"id": "2", "description": "Create index.ts", "status": "completed"},
    {"id": "3", "description": "Create utils.js", "status": "completed"},

]>

<tool_call>
{"command": "create", "file_text": "# Full-Stack Project\n\nThis is a small full-stack project containing various components.\n\n## Usage\n\n- Run `python app.py` to start the Flask server.\n- Use `index.ts` for TypeScript logic.\n- Use `utils.js` for JavaScript utility functions.", "path": "/workspace/README.md"}
</tool_call>
